key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (Hold Expected, Powell Final Meeting)
key_events_next_24h.note: Rate hold at 3.50-3.75% near-certain (CME FedWatch 100%). Pre-event uncertainty weighing on BTC. Hold priced in — no immediate shock expected from the decision itself.

key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Chair Powell Press Conference
key_events_next_24h.note: Powell's likely final meeting as Fed chair. Hawkish tone risk elevated with Brent crude >$104 and CPI at 3.3% YoY. Forward guidance tone is the key catalyst for crypto direction post-FOMC.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: Yesterday saw $263M in outflows — significant reversal after 9 consecutive inflow days. Key signal for institutional sentiment direction.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran / Hormuz Watch (Ongoing)
key_events_next_24h.note: Hormuz restrictions ongoing, Brent >$104/barrel. No resolution imminent. Sustained oil pressure keeps inflation concerns elevated, reducing Fed dovish pivot probability.

notes: FOMC 오늘 18시 금리동결 예상, BTC $80K 저항 실패 지속

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,582 as of Apr 29 06:30 UTC. Down from ~$78,000 Monday open. Failed $80K resistance twice in past week. Support ~$75,000 (100-day MA area).
sentiment_key_signals: BTC twice rejected at $80K resistance — technical ceiling intact
Spot BTC ETF outflows: $263M Apr 28 — breaking 9-day positive inflow streak, bearish signal
Negative Coinbase premium index — weakening US spot demand
Fear & Greed Index: recovering from lows but sentiment fragile with mixed geopolitical signals
BTC dominance >60% — altcoins underperform; flight-to-quality within crypto
KelpDAO exploit: $292M stolen, $14B DeFi TVL exodus (Apr 20) — DeFi sentiment still depressed
Brent crude >$104/barrel (Hormuz restrictions) — inflation pressure sustained
FOMC Apr 29: decision at 18:00 UTC, press conference 18:30 UTC — key macro catalyst today
No CPI/PPI releases in next 24h (CPI Apr: May 12; PPI Apr: May 13)
Crypto market cap fell 1.3% to $2.64T on Apr 28
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC decision at 18:00 UTC today (Apr 29). Rate hold near-certain (100% CME FedWatch) but Powell press conference (18:30 UTC) is key risk — forward guidance on inflation outlook matters. Oil >$104 reduces likelihood of dovish tone. ETF outflows turning negative and $80K double rejection reinforce bearish short-term bias.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bearish (0.62): BTC failed $80K twice, ETF outflows $263M (reversal after 9-day streak), negative Coinbase premium, Hormuz/oil headwinds, FOMC pre-event uncertainty. Partially offset by 60%+ BTC dominance and rate hold fully priced in. Confidence 0.62 — macro filter ACTIVE. Prefer SHORT bias or HOLD until after FOMC press conference resolves directional uncertainty.
